name: Nelnet Bank
description_short: Nelnet Bank offers private student loans, refinancing, and deposit products including high-yield savings accounts and CDs for education funding and personal savings.
description_long:
Nelnet Bank is an online financial institution that specializes in education financing and consumer banking services. The company operates as a digital bank with a focus on serving students and families managing education costs, while also providing traditional deposit and savings products to a broader customer base.

The bank's primary offerings include private student loans for undergraduate education (fixed rates from 3.47% APR), graduate student loans (from 4.99% APR), parent loans (from 5.97% APR), and student loan refinancing services (from 6.52% APR). Beyond education lending, Nelnet Bank provides high-yield savings accounts with 3.25% APY and no monthly fees, Certificates of Deposit with competitive rates (3.05% APY on 12-month CDs), and home remodeling loans. The company advertises that student loan applications can be reviewed without impacting credit scores and emphasizes flexible payment plans with autopay discounts.

Nelnet Bank differentiates itself through its dual focus on education financing combined with consumer banking products, competitive starting rates across loan categories, and transparent fee structures on deposit products. The company highlights that student loans cover up to 100% of education costs with no hidden fees and that home remodeling loans include direct contractor payment options.

As an online bank, Nelnet Bank operates without physical branch locations, which may limit accessibility for customers preferring in-person banking. Rates are variable and subject to individual qualification, with advertised rates representing starting points rather than guaranteed offerings. The company requires minimum balances for deposit products ($100 for savings accounts, $1,000 for CDs) and applies early withdrawal penalties on CDs. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Private undergraduate student loans (fixed rates from 3.47% APR)
Graduate student loans (fixed rates from 4.99% APR)
Parent loans for education funding (fixed rates from 5.97% APR)
Student loan refinancing services (fixed rates from 6.52% APR)
High-yield savings accounts (3.25% APY with no monthly fees)
Certificates of Deposit (12-month CDs at 3.05% APY)
Home remodeling loans with competitive rates
Direct contractor payment option for home improvement loans
Prequalification review without credit score impact
pros: Student loan rates start at 3.47% APR for undergraduate loans, competitive among private student lenders
High-yield savings account offers 3.25% APY with no monthly fees and daily compounding interest
Student loan prequalification available without impacting credit score
Private student loans can cover up to 100% of education costs with no hidden fees advertised
Flexible payment plans and autopay discounts on loan products
Home remodeling loans available with direct contractor payment option
Certificates of Deposit with competitive rates and guaranteed returns
cons: Online-only bank with no physical branch locations for in-person banking needs
Requires $1,000 minimum balance for CDs and $100 for savings accounts, which may exclude some customers
Advertised rates are variable and subject to individual creditworthiness; actual rates may be significantly higher than advertised starting rates
Early withdrawal penalties apply to CDs, reducing liquidity for emergency savings
Limited deposit product offerings compared to traditional full-service banks
best_for: Undergraduate and graduate students seeking private education financing with competitive rates and flexible terms
Parents looking to finance their children's education costs through dedicated parent loans
Borrowers with existing student debt seeking refinancing at lower rates without multiple applications
Savers seeking high-yield deposit accounts through an online-only platform
diagnosis: Nelnet Bank is best for students and parents seeking education financing with competitive rates or savers looking for high-yield deposit accounts through a digital banking platform. The primary caveat is that advertised rates represent only starting points; actual approved rates depend on creditworthiness and may be substantially higher than displayed rates.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
